_source: Manual constellation classification by Claude based on perk name, description (from extracted_perks.json), and existing catalog patterns for the same jump.
_note: Used by parse_reference.py as a final fallback when neither perks_catalog.json nor the Reference xlsx Unabridged List can match a perk to a constellation. Keys are 'name|source' (or just 'name' if source is empty). Every entry has a one-line reason for the classification.

Alchemy Fiats|Fullmetal Alchemist.reason: name explicitly Alchemy; FMA is the Alchemy jump

Class Jumper|Fate Servant Supplement.reason: Fate Servant Supplement maps to Crafting per catalog

Magecraft C|Fate Servant Supplement.reason: Fate Servant Supplement maps to Crafting per catalog

Noble Phantasm C|Fate Servant Supplement.reason: Fate Servant Supplement maps to Crafting per catalog

Territory Creation E|Fate Servant Supple.reason: Fate Servant Supplement maps to Crafting per catalog

Sky Machinist|Skies of Arcadia.reason: machinery repair/build expertise; Skies of Arcadia maps to Knowledge

Mental Fortress|The World Ends With You.reason: TWEWY personal-enhancement perk; jump maps to Quality

General Level Potential|Akame ga Kill.reason: physical/spiritual ability potential; Akame ga Kill is Quality

Imperial Arms/Teigu|Akame ga Kill.reason: free Teigu (special weapon); cluster freebie of Quality cap

Perfect Hair|Akame ga Kill.reason: aesthetic enhancement; cluster freebie of Quality cap

Simple Sturdy Weapon|Akame ga Kill.reason: starter weapon item; cluster freebie of Quality cap

Core Ability - Amp Core|Titanfall.reason: Titan core ability; Titanfall is Vehicles

Oi!|Titanfall.reason: Titanfall flavor freebie; jump maps to Vehicles

Deadbeat Holiday|Binbougami Ga!.reason: personality/comedic enhancement; jump maps to Quality

ARM SLAVE M6 Bushnell|Full Metal Panic.reason: an Arm Slave is a piloted mech; classic vehicle perk

Farming tool|Viking Saga.reason: Viking Saga maps to Quality per catalog

Primo Victoria|Sabaton.reason: Sabaton CD/song bonus; jump maps to R&D dominantly

Altmode|Transformers.reason: transformer altmode; Transformers is Size dominantly

Gladius-class Heavy Corvette|Halo.reason: literal warship - Vehicles regardless of catalog mapping

Emblems|Kerbal Space Program.reason: KSP cluster freebie; jump is Vehicles

This Is, Actually, Rocket Science|Kerbal.reason: orbital mechanics knowledge; KSP cluster freebie

Gifts from the Little Ones|Bloodborne.reason: Bloodborne weapon set; Crafting fits weapon items

Aspect Cultivation|Lord of Light.reason: personal capability enhancement (Aspect = state of being)

Skill Tag|Fallout.reason: boost to three skills; classic Knowledge perk

Round Telephone|Stargate SG-1.reason: ability to operate the Stargate; Stargate maps to Knowledge

Global Operations|Metal Gear.reason: cluster freebie of Capstone perk 'A New Age of Warfare'

Signature Weapon|Metal Gear.reason: cluster freebie of Capstone perk 'A New Age of Warfare'

Bloodied Combat + Blood Artisan Plus|Blo.reason: blood crystallization ability; Bloodborne blood magic
